seoTitle: Peaceful Bay vs Pearsall — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Peaceful Bay and Pearsall. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Peaceful Bay vs Pearsall: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peaceful Bay and Pearsall.
heading: Peaceful Bay vs Pearsall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peaceful Bay, Western Australia and Pearsall, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pearsall has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Peaceful Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peaceful Bay or Pearsall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peaceful Bay has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Pearsall scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peaceful Bay scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Pearsall scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peaceful Bay or Pearsall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pearsall has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
